requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (BSTI / BDS IEC 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（BSTI / BDS IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（BSTI / BDS IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances imported into and sold in Bangladesh must meet the electrical-safety requirements administered by the Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution (BSTI) under the BSTI Act, 2018. The applicable product safety standard is the Bangladesh Standard (BDS) that adopts the IEC 60335 series, principally IEC 60335-1 (general requirements) together with IEC 60335-2-24 (particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers). BSTI generally adopts IEC standards as BDS IEC equivalents. Conformity is established through BSTI testing and the issue of a Certification Mark (CM) licence following sample testing at a BSTI or BSTI-recognised laboratory; the CM mark must be displayed before the product is placed on the Bangladesh market. Key requirements mirror IEC 60335-2-24: protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, thermal cut-outs, creepage and clearance distances, mechanical strength, earthing continuity, and appliance markings appropriate to 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase supply.
summary.zh: 进口并在孟加拉国销售的家用制冷器具须符合孟加拉标准与检验院（BSTI）依据《2018年BSTI法》监管的电气安全要求。适用的产品安全标准为采用IEC 60335系列的孟加拉国标准（BDS），主要为IEC 60335-1（通用要求）以及IEC 60335-2-24（制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求）。BSTI一般以BDS IEC等同形式采用IEC标准。合格性通过BSTI检测确立，在BSTI或BSTI认可实验室完成样品检测后签发认证标志（CM）许可；产品在投放孟加拉国市场前须展示CM标志。核心要求与IEC 60335-2-24一致：防触电保护、绝缘电阻与介电强度、热断路器、爬电距离与电气间隙、机械强度、接地连续性，以及适用于220 V/50 Hz单相供电的器具标识。
summary.zht: 進口並在孟加拉銷售的家用製冷器具須符合孟加拉標準與檢驗院（BSTI）依據《2018年BSTI法》監管的電氣安全要求。適用的產品安全標準為採用IEC 60335系列的孟加拉標準（BDS），主要為IEC 60335-1（通用要求）以及IEC 60335-2-24（製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求）。BSTI一般以BDS IEC等同形式採用IEC標準。合格性通過BSTI檢測確立，在BSTI或BSTI認可實驗室完成樣品檢測後簽發認證標誌（CM）許可；產品在投放孟加拉市場前須展示CM標誌。核心要求與IEC 60335-2-24一致：防觸電保護、絕緣電阻與介電強度、熱斷路器、爬電距離與電氣間隙、機械強度、接地連續性，以及適用於220 V/50 Hz單相供電的器具標識。

standards_or_laws: BSTI Act, 2018 — legal basis for BSTI standards and the Certification Mark (CM) scheme administered by the Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution

BDS IEC 60335-2-24 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (Bangladesh adoption of IEC 60335-2-24)
BDS IEC 60335-1 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 but incorporating Chinese national deviations, read with the general standard GB 4706.1. GB 4706.13-2014 is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated certification body before sale in China. Because both China (GB 4706.13) and Bangladesh (BDS IEC 60335-2-24) trace to the same IEC 60335-2-24 base, the underlying technical content is largely aligned, but the conformity-assessment route differs: a Chinese CCC certificate is not accepted by BSTI as evidence for a CM licence.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010但包含中国国家偏差，须与通用标准GB 4706.1结合使用。GB 4706.13-2014为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度执行；产品须经CNCA指定认证机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。由于中国（GB 4706.13）与孟加拉国（BDS IEC 60335-2-24）均溯源于同一IEC 60335-2-24基础，底层技术内容大体一致，但合格评定路径不同：中国CCC证书不被BSTI接受为CM许可的依据。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010但包含中國國家偏差，須與通用標準GB 4706.1結合使用。GB 4706.13-2014為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度執行；產品須經CNCA指定認證機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。由於中國（GB 4706.13）與孟加拉（BDS IEC 60335-2-24）均溯源於同一IEC 60335-2-24基礎，底層技術內容大體一致，但合格評定路徑不同：中國CCC證書不被BSTI接受為CM許可的依據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Although both standards descend from IEC 60335-2-24, exporters cannot rely on Chinese CCC test data for BSTI: (1) BSTI CM licence — the manufacturer/importer must apply for a BSTI Certification Mark licence and submit samples for testing at a BSTI or BSTI-recognised laboratory against the relevant BDS IEC 60335 standard; CCC certificates and CNAS reports are not accepted in lieu of BSTI testing. (2) Test-report acceptance — an IECEE CB Scheme report (IEC 60335-2-24 basis) with a BSTI-acceptable CB test certificate may reduce re-testing scope, but acceptance is at BSTI's discretion and must be confirmed case by case. (3) Markings and language — appliance markings and the user manual must suit the 220 V / 50 Hz Bangladesh supply and BSTI marking rules; the CM mark must be applied. (4) Plug/cord — products must be supplied with a Bangladesh-appropriate plug (type D/G/K-style) or be clearly intended for fitting by the importer.
gap.zh: 尽管两套标准均源自IEC 60335-2-24，出口商不能依赖中国CCC检测数据满足BSTI：（1）BSTI CM许可——制造商/进口商须申请BSTI认证标志许可，并向BSTI或BSTI认可实验室提交样品，依据相应的BDS IEC 60335标准进行检测；CCC证书和CNAS报告不被接受替代BSTI检测。（2）检测报告接受度——基于IEC 60335-2-24的IECEE CB体系报告及BSTI可接受的CB测试证书或可缩减重新检测范围，但接受与否由BSTI酌情决定，须逐案确认。（3）标识与语言——器具标识及用户手册须适配220 V/50 Hz孟加拉国供电及BSTI标识规则，并加贴CM标志。（4）插头/电源线——产品须配备适用于孟加拉国的插头（D/G/K型）或明确说明由进口商配装。
gap.zht: 儘管兩套標準均源自IEC 60335-2-24，出口商不能依賴中國CCC檢測數據滿足BSTI：（1）BSTI CM許可——製造商/進口商須申請BSTI認證標誌許可，並向BSTI或BSTI認可實驗室提交樣品，依據相應的BDS IEC 60335標準進行檢測；CCC證書和CNAS報告不被接受替代BSTI檢測。（2）檢測報告接受度——基於IEC 60335-2-24的IECEE CB體系報告及BSTI可接受的CB測試證書或可縮減重新檢測範圍，但接受與否由BSTI酌情決定，須逐案確認。（3）標識與語言——器具標識及用戶手冊須適配220 V/50 Hz孟加拉供電及BSTI標識規則，並加貼CM標誌。（4）插頭/電源線——產品須配備適用於孟加拉的插頭（D/G/K型）或明確說明由進口商配裝。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — BSTI Certification Mark (CM) licence required before import and sale for refrigerators on Bangladesh's compulsory-certification list, assessed against BDS IEC 60335-2-24 under the BSTI Act, 2018
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A BSTI Certification Mark (CM) licence to BDS IEC 60335-2-24 is the mandatory electrical-safety gate for household refrigerators in Bangladesh. Because both Chinese GB 4706.13 and BDS IEC 60335-2-24 derive from IEC 60335-2-24, technical content is largely aligned, but Chinese CCC certification does not satisfy the BSTI route; BSTI sample testing and a CM licence are required. An IECEE CB Scheme report may reduce re-testing scope subject to BSTI acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据BDS IEC 60335-2-24取得的BSTI认证标志（CM）许可是家用电冰箱在孟加拉国的强制性电气安全门槛。由于中国GB 4706.13与BDS IEC 60335-2-24均源自IEC 60335-2-24，技术内容大体一致，但中国CCC认证不满足BSTI路径；须经BSTI样品检测并取得CM许可。IECEE CB体系报告或可缩减重新检测范围，须经BSTI接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據BDS IEC 60335-2-24取得的BSTI認證標誌（CM）許可是家用電冰箱在孟加拉的強制性電氣安全門檻。由於中國GB 4706.13與BDS IEC 60335-2-24均源自IEC 60335-2-24，技術內容大體一致，但中國CCC認證不滿足BSTI路徑；須經BSTI樣品檢測並取得CM許可。IECEE CB體系報告或可縮減重新檢測範圍，須經BSTI接受。
